tipRules.tip: Becker (MLF pro): 'Wacky rig 5-inch Senko around docks with 7ft 2in medium-heavy spinning rod, 20lb braid mainline to 12-15lb fluorocarbon leader. Heavier leader facilitates faster sink and better durability around dock posts'
Becker (MLF pro): 'Position upwind of target for better casting accuracy. Target shaded regions beneath docks. Watch line movement for bites on the fall - use bright-colored braid for detection'

knowledge.insight: Becker (MLF pro): Uses 7ft 2in MH spinning rod, 20lb braid mainline (abrasion resistance around docks), 12-15lb fluorocarbon leader. TroKar TK137 Finesse Hook 1/0 with unique bend that locks and holds fish
Becker (MLF pro): 'Bites commonly go undetected while Senko sinks on slack. Watch line movement and use bright-colored braid to see line bites'
Becker (MLF pro): 'Heavier fluorocarbon leader (15lb vs 12lb) facilitates faster sink rate in addition to better durability around docks'
